recentChats.title: Recent chats
recentChats.nudge: Sign in to see your conversations and plans with people nearby.
recentChats.error: Couldn't load your chats just now.
recentChats.empty: No chats yet. Message a friend or open a plan to start one — it'll show up here.

trending.title: Trending nearby
trending.error: Couldn't load venues near you just now.

townForum.title: Town forum
townForum.error: Couldn't load the forum just now.

savedDeals.title: Saved deals
savedDeals.empty: Deals you save will appear here, ready to redeem in-venue.

followed.title: Followed venues
followed.nudge: Follow a business to unlock its exclusive loyalty deals — they'll appear here, just for followers.
followed.error: Couldn't load your followed venues just now.
followed.empty: You're not following any businesses yet. Follow one to get its exclusive loyalty deals here.
followed.noDeals: No live deals from your venues right now — we'll show them here the moment one posts a loyalty offer.

plans.title: Your plans
plans.nudge: Make plans — a night out, a weekend, a list to try — and save venues to them.
plans.error: Couldn't load your plans just now.
plans.empty: No plans yet — start one and add venues from anywhere on Roam.

market.title: {place} market
market.body: Buy, sell and swap with people in your town — list something in a minute, agree in chat, meet locally.

homeFeed.title: Your local feed
homeFeed.error: Couldn't load your feed just now.
homeFeed.followingNudge: Sign in and follow your favourite local businesses — their news, offers and events land here.
homeFeed.emptyFollowing: No posts from venues you follow yet — follow a few on Explore and their updates will land here.
homeFeed.emptyLocal: Nothing moving in {place} just yet — check back soon, or be the one who starts something in the Town Hall.

homeCustomize.title: Customise home
homeCustomize.subtitle: Drag the handle to reorder, or hide the sections you see.

placeSwitcher.geoError: Couldn't get your location. Pick a place instead.

suggested.title: Suggested for you
suggested.intro: Tailored offer and post ideas — review and edit each one before it goes out.
suggested.published: Published — find it in Offers above to tweak or add a code.

nearbyDepartures.title: Nearby departures
nearbyDepartures.noDepartures: No departures in the next while.

comingSoon.title: Local transit
comingSoon.body: Live bus & train departures for {place} are on the way — powered by Translink, across Ireland.

birthdayOffer.intro: Set a treat and we'll deliver it automatically to followers on their birthday — the ones who've opted in. You never see whose birthday it is, only how many were sent.
birthdayOffer.redeemedPct: {pct}% of birthday treats have been redeemed.
birthdayOffer.detailsPlaceholder: Show this message in-venue on your birthday to claim.
